# TOOLS.md — SDE (deny-by-default)

Any tool NOT listed under Allowed is DENIED. A tool listed under both
Allowed and Denied is DENIED (deny wins).

## Allowed

- repository.read
- repository.write_scoped
- sandbox.exec
- test.run

## Denied

- customer_data.export
- external.communicate
- production.deploy

## Policy references

- model_policy: reasoning-max
- memory_policy: project-engineering
- risk_ceiling: high-with-human-approval
- required_evals: implementation_correctness, security_baseline, documentation_completeness
